description: Use this API to retrieve the list of files in the specified group. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, sfiles = scenariofilelist(sgroup)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Group to retrieve the file list of. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: sfiles
return_values.description: An array of NFILES elements specifying list of files in the specified group. (output).
